title: Invalid expression in Google Sheets node
symptom: The Google Sheets node throws an 'Invalid expression' error when trying to execute the workflow.
not_this_if: No error in Google Sheets node
root_cause: The error occurs because the Google Sheets node is receiving multiple items from the Merge node in 'Append' mode, which it cannot process as a valid input expression. The node expects a single item to work with.
fix_steps: Change the merge mode from 'Append' to 'Combine by position'
agent_instruction: Change the Merge node to 'Combine by position' mode and save the workflow.
